mapper.select:
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE MBR_USE_YN = 'Y') AS totalMembers,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE MBR_USE_YN = 'Y' AND DATE(MBR_JOIN_DATE) = CURDATE()) AS newMembersToday, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY WHERE COMM_USE_YN = 'Y') AS totalPosts,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORT) AS totalReports FROM DUAL
SELECT MBR_ID AS mbrId, MBR_NICKNAME AS mbrNickname, MBR_EMAIL AS mbrEmail, MBR_JOIN_DATE AS mbrJoinDate FROM MEMBER ORDER BY MBR_JOIN_DATE DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT COMM_NO AS commNo, COMM_TITLE AS commTitle, COMM_REG_DATE AS commRegDate FROM COMMUNITY WHERE COMM_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY COMM_NO DESC LIMIT 5
